title: Resurrections
description: This is a Minecraft mod I made for my hardcore multiplayer server. After a player dies, they drop their soul which can be placed in the reviving station and revived.
body:
# Resurrections

The mod was originally made for a hardcore server that I was running. It currently adds a way to revive players after they die, with config on the way for almost everything.

## Blocks

This mod currently adds 1 block to the game; the  **Resurrecting Station**. Which is crafted with the recipe below.  
![The crafting recipe for the Resurrecting  station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1515234ea0467b01da5feea7a8fc82246e40721a.png)

## Items

This mod currently adds 3* items to the game. **Soul**, which is dropped upon player death. Whenever the soul is in either the world, inventory or any other container it will slowly decay until it deletes itself. **Soul Essence** is obtained by shift-right-clicking a held soul and destroying it. It also adds **Soul Tomes**, which vary in power, with the first tier (lesser) having a chance for restoring half a **Soul Heart**. The second tier (greater) guarantees half a **Soul Heart** and a chance for another half. The final tier (pure) guarantees a whole **Soul Heart** and a chance to obtain an extra 2.

## Resurrection

The process of reviving a dead player is really simple, after crafting the  **Resurrecting Station**, use a player's  **Soul**  on the  **Resurrection Station**  and the reviving process will begin.

> Player  **Soul**s will decay even while in the  **Resurrecting Station**  but you can see the remaining percentage of the time remaining.

> The **Resurrecting Station** will emit a comparator signal relative to the amount of time remaining.

While the player is in the  **Resurrecting Station**, you can use items (in the config  **soon^TM^**) to repair the player's soul. Different items repair their soul a different amount, with hard caps for the amount of each item usable to repair the  **Soul**. After the souls is fully repaired, the player is brought back into the Resurrecting station and the occupied  **Soul**  item is destroyed.

## Planned features

Currently the mod is  _**not**_  feature complete. I am planning to add:

-   Config for near everything
    
-   More features related to resurrection, with 2 currently in planned for v1.3
    
-   More features to do with souls, including a whole new dimension!  (name drop at 100 downloads)
    
-   And a few more things that are secret right now :)
    

# WARNINGS

This is my  **first public mod!!!!!**  It probably has  **many bugs!**  Please report any bugs to me on discord (@x_explotion) and I'll try to fix them but still: beware! The player data for a soul is stored in a component of the item, called (something or other). This can be used to spawn them in with commands if anything happens. Please be patient with me as I try to fix them. Have fun!

This mod is going on the back burner for a little bit, a content update is planned in the future but I am unsure of it.
